message.content:
Explore the Notes feature implementation and data model:

1. Read `src/stores/useNotesStore.ts` - the Zustand store for notes
2. Look for notes-related types in `src/types/` 
3. Check what features exist: folders, tags, search, templates, export, backlinks
4. Look at `src/widgets/NotesEditor/` folder for editor plugins and capabilities
5. Check for any related services in `src/services/` (noteExport, notePdfExport, etc.)

Provide a comprehensive inventory of:
- Data model (Note type, folder structure)
- All existing features
- Editor capabilities (Lexical plugins)
- Export/import functionality
- Any missing features compared to modern note apps

1→/**
     2→ * Daily Notes Service
     3→ *
     4→ * Implements Obsidian/Roam/Logseq-style daily notes pattern:
     5→ * - Automatic note creation for any date
     6→ * - Template-based content generation
     7→ * - Yesterday/tomorrow auto-linking
     8→ * - Dedicated folder organization
     9→ *
    10→ * Usage:
    11→ *   const note = await getOrCreateDailyNote(new Date());
    12→ *   const calendar = await getDailyNotesCalendar(11, 2025); // December 2025
    13→ */
    14→
    15→import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
    16→import type { Note } from '../types/notes';
    17→import { formatDateLong, getStandardDateKey } from '../utils/dateUtils';
    18→import { logger } from './logger';
    19→
    20→const log = logger.module('DailyNotesService');
    21→
    22→export interface DailyNotesSettings {
    23→  enabled: boolean;
    24→  folderId: string | null;
    25→  template: string;
    26→  dateFormat: 'long' | 'iso' | 'short'; // "November 26, 2025" | "2025-11-26" | "Nov 26, 2025"
    27→}
    28→
    29→/**
    30→ * Default daily note template with placeholders
    31→ */
    32→export const DEFAULT_DAILY_NOTE_TEMPLATE = `# {date}
    33→
    34→## 📅 Tasks
    35→- [ ]
    36→
    37→## 🎯 Goals for today
    38→
    39→
    40→## 📝 Notes
    41→
    42→
    43→## 🔗 Related
    44→- [[{yesterday}]]
    45→- [[{tomorrow}]]
    46→
    47→## ✨ Highlights
    48→
    49→
    50→#daily-note`;
    51→
    52→/**
    53→ * Default daily notes settings
    54→ */
    55→export const DEFAULT_DAILY_NOTES_SETTINGS: DailyNotesSettings = {
    56→  enabled: true,
    57→  folderId: null, // Will be set to dedicated "Daily Notes" folder ID
    58→  template: DEFAULT_DAILY_NOTE_TEMPLATE,
    59→  dateFormat: 'long',
    60→};

content.text: Let me check one more utility file to understand the full feature set:

Perfect! Now I have comprehensive coverage of the Notes feature. Let me compile the complete inventory:

## Comprehensive Notes Feature Inventory

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's a complete inventory of the Notes feature implementation in Neuman Brain:

---

## 1. DATA MODEL

### Core Types (`src/types/notes.ts`)

**Note Interface:**
- `id` (UUID v4) - unique identifier
- `folderId` (string | null) - parent folder, null = root
- `title` (string) - plain text
- `content` (string) - Lexical JSON state
- `contentText` (string) - plain text version for search
- `tags` (string[]) - categorization (max 50 per note)
- `projectIds` (string[]) - for global project context filtering
- `createdAt`, `updatedAt` (Date) - timestamps
- `isPinned` (boolean) - pin to top
- `isArchived` (boolean) - hide from main view
- `color?` (string) - optional card color
- `icon?` (string) - optional emoji
- `isFavorite?` (boolean) - star/favorite
- `linkedNotes?` (string[]) - Phase 4: notes this links to via [[syntax]]
- `customFields?` (CustomFieldsMap) - P2: user-defined metadata

**Folder Interface:**
- `id` (UUID v4)
- `parentId` (string | null) - parent folder, supports unlimited nesting
- `name` (string)
- `color?`, `icon?` - optional styling
- `createdAt`, `updatedAt` (Date)
- `isExpanded` (boolean) - UI state for tree view
- `sortOrder?` (number) - sort within parent

**Other Types:**
- `SearchIndex` - for full-text search entries
- `FolderTreeNode` - computed for tree rendering with children, depth, path, note counts
- `SearchResult` - search hits with score and highlighting
- `EditorState` - UI state (activeNoteId, isFullscreen, isSidebarCollapsed, showMetadata, wordCount, characterCount, isSaving, lastSaved)
- `NoteTemplate` - template metadata (id, name, description, icon, category, defaultTags, isBuiltIn)
- `Attachment` - future file attachments
- `Backlink` - bidirectional link metadata
- `TagSuggestion` - P2: intelligent tag recommendations
- `BlockReference` - P2: block-level references
- `NotePreview` - P2: hover preview popover data

**Constants:**
- Default title: "Untitled Note"
- Max title: 200 chars
- Max content: 1,000,000 chars
- Max tags: 50 per note
- Max tag length: 50 chars
- Search debounce: 150ms
- Auto-save debounce: 2000ms
- Max search results: 50
- Max folder depth: 10

---

## 2. STATE MANAGEMENT (`src/stores/useNotesStore.ts`)

### Zustand Store with Persist Middleware

**State:**
- `notes` (Record<id, Note>)
- `activeNoteId` (string | null)
- `sortConfig` (field: 'updatedAt'|'createdAt'|'title'|'manual', order: 'asc'|'desc')
- `filter` ('all'|'favorites'|'pinned'|'archived'|'unarchived')
- `customNoteTemplates` (NoteTemplate[])

### CRUD Operations:
- `createNote(params?)` - creates with auto-selection
- `getNote(id)` - retrieve single note
- `updateNote(id, updates)` - updates with conditional timestamp
- `deleteNote(id)` - deletes with undo support
- `duplicateNote(id)` - creates copy (no pin/favorite copied)

### Bulk Operations:
- `deleteNotes(ids[])`, `moveNotesToFolder(ids[], folderId)`, `archiveNotes(ids[])`, `unarchiveNotes(ids[])`

### Queries:
- `getAllNotes()` - filtered + sorted
- `getFilteredNotes()` - respects global project context filter
- `getNotesByFolder(folderId)` - with filtering & sorting
- `getNotesBy(predicate)` - custom filter
- `searchNotes(query)` - searches title, content text, tags

### Pin/Archive/Favorite:
- `togglePin(id)`, `toggleArchive(id)`, `toggleFavorite(id)`

### Tag Management:
- `addTag(id, tag)`, `removeTag(id, tag)`, `getAllTags()`, `getTagUsageCounts()`
- `renameTag(old, new)`, `mergeTags(source[], target)`, `deleteTag(tag)`
- `renameTagGlobally(old, new)`, `deleteTagGlobally(tag)`
- Bulk: `bulkAddTag(ids[], tag)`, `bulkRemoveTag(ids[], tag)`, `replaceTag(old, new)`

### UI State:
- `setActiveNote(id)`, `setSortConfig(config)`, `setFilter(filter)`

### Utility:
- `getNoteCount()`, `getNotesInFolder(id)`, `exportNotes()`, `importNotes(notes[], merge)`
- `clearAllNotes()`

### Backlinks (Phase 4):
- `getBacklinks(noteId)` - notes linking TO this
- `updateLinkedNotes(noteId, content)` - parses [[links]] and updates linkedNotes array

### Unlinked Mentions (P1):
- `convertToWikiLink(noteId, position, targetTitle)` - text selection → [[link]]

### Templates (Phase 4):
- `getNoteTemplates()` - default + custom
- `createNoteFromTemplate(templateId)` - auto-creates note with template content
- `createNoteTemplate(params)`, `updateNoteTemplate(id, updates)`, `deleteNoteTemplate(id)`
- `getNoteTemplate(id)`, `getAllNoteTemplates()`
- 5 built-in templates: Meeting Notes, Daily Journal, Project Plan, Todo List, Weekly Review

### Daily Notes:
- `getDailyNote(date)` - find existing
- `createDailyNote(date)` - creates new
- `getOrCreateDailyNote(date)` - get or auto-create

### Block-Level Links & Hover Preview (P2):
- `getBlockContent(noteId, blockId)` - retrieve block text
- `getNotePreview(noteId, blockId?)` - generate preview for hover

**Persistence:**
- IndexedDB via `createSyncedStorage()`
- Version 3 with migration support (added projectIds field)
- Partialize: only notes + customNoteTemplates persisted (not UI state)
- Date serialization: converts strings back to Date objects on rehydrate

---

## 3. EDITOR CAPABILITIES (`src/widgets/NotesEditor.tsx`)

### Core Editor:
- **Lexical-based** rich text editor with:
  - Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd/Ctrl+B, I, U)
  - Auto-save (debounced)
  - Word/character count tracking
  - Full undo/redo support

### Plugins:
- **RichTextPlugin** - headings, bold, italic, underline
- **ListPlugin** - ordered/unordered lists
- **TablePlugin** - table creation and editing
- **MarkdownShortcutPlugin** - markdown syntax → formatting (e.g., `# ` → H1)
- **AutoLinkPlugin** - URL detection and auto-linking
- **HistoryPlugin** - undo/redo
- **WikiLinkAutocompletePlugin** - [[Note Title]] autocomplete with suggestions
- **WikiLinkTransformPlugin** - detects [[links]], transforms to WikiLinkNode, handles link creation
- **HoverPreviewPlugin** - hover preview popovers for links
- **BlockReferencePlugin** - [[Note Title#block]] syntax for block-level references
- **HashtagPlugin** - #tag syntax support and parsing
- **ImageUploadPlugin** - drag-drop and paste image support with IndexedDB storage

### Supported Node Types:
- HeadingNode (h1, h2, h3)
- QuoteNode
- ListNode, ListItemNode (ordered/unordered)
- CodeNode, CodeHighlightNode (with syntax highlighting)
- LinkNode, AutoLinkNode
- TableNode, TableCellNode, TableRowNode
- ImageNode (custom - stores in IndexedDB with compression)
- WikiLinkNode (custom - [[Note Title]] links)
- HashtagNode (custom - #tag syntax)

### Features:
- Real-time title + content synchronization to store
- Tag picker integrated UI
- Custom field editor for P2 metadata
- Backlinks panel showing note references
- Lexical error boundary for graceful error handling
- Full-screen mode toggle
- Metadata panel (optional)

---

## 4. ADVANCED LINKING FEATURES

### Wiki-Style Backlinks (Phase 4):
- **Syntax:** `[[Note Title]]` or `[[Note Title#block-id]]` (block references)
- Syntax parsing via `extractWikiLinks(content)` regex
- Link resolution with exact + partial title matching
- Broken link detection (red styling when target note doesn't exist)
- Bidirectional linking: `note.linkedNotes` stores target IDs
- **BacklinksPanel component** displays:
  - Incoming backlinks (notes linking TO current)
  - Outgoing links (notes this links TO)
  - P1: Unlinked mentions (implicit text references)
  - P1: Broken links (targets that don't exist) with option to create

### Unlinked Mentions (P1 - Not Yet Implemented):
- Text matching note titles without [[]] syntax
- "Convert to link" action in BacklinksPanel
- Helps identify implicit relationships

### Block References (P2 - Planned):
- Target specific blocks: `[[Note Title#block-id]]`
- `BlockReferencePlugin` and `BlockIdIndicator` files exist
- Hover shows block content, not full note

### Hover Previews (Phase 4):
- **HoverPreviewPlugin** shows 5-line preview on link hover
- Max 300 chars per preview
- 500ms hover debounce
- Caches 20 recent previews
- Works with both full notes and block references

---

## 5. TEMPLATES

### Built-In Templates (5):
1. **Meeting Notes** - Date, Attendees, Agenda, Discussion Points, Action Items
2. **Daily Journal** - Gratitude, Today's Goals, Reflections, Tomorrow's Focus
3. **Project Plan** - Overview, Goals, Timeline (table), Resources, Risks
4. **Todo List** - High/Medium/Low/Completed priorities
5. **Weekly Review** - Accomplishments, Challenges, Lessons, Goals, Notes

### Custom Templates:
- User-created templates stored in `customNoteTemplates`
- Support name, description, icon, category, defaultTags
- Built-in templates protected from editing/deletion

### Daily Notes (Obsidian-style):
- **Settings:** enabled, folderId, template, dateFormat (long|iso|short)
- **Template placeholders:** {date}, {yesterday}, {tomorrow}
- **Default template:** Tasks, Goals, Notes, Related (yesterday/tomorrow links), Highlights
- Auto-creates notes for any date
- Yesterday/tomorrow auto-linking via wiki link syntax
- Dedicated folder organization

---

## 6. EXPORT/IMPORT FUNCTIONALITY

### Markdown Export (`src/utils/markdownExport.ts`):
- **Lexical to Markdown:** Uses `@lexical/markdown` TRANSFORMERS
- **YAML Frontmatter:** title, created, updated, tags, folder, pinned status
- **ZIP Export:** Multiple notes with folder structure preserved
- **Scope options:** Single note, folder tree, all notes
- **Options:** Include/exclude archived, include folder structure
- Preserves wiki links (`[[Note Title]]`)

### PDF Export (`src/services/notePdfExport.ts`):
- **Lazy loads jsPDF** only when exporting
- A4 size with 20mm margins
- Title (20pt bold), metadata (date, tags), content
- Automatic page breaks for long content
- Footer with page numbers
- Filename: `{title}-{date}.pdf`

### Markdown to Lexical:
- `lexicalToPlainText(content)` extracts plain text
- `lexicalToMarkdown(content)` converts to markdown (heading, paragraph, list, quote, code, link)

### Import/Export in Store:
- `exportNotes()` - returns all notes as array
- `importNotes(notes[], merge)` - replace all or merge with existing

---

## 7. SEARCH & FILTERING

### Full-Text Search:
- `searchNotes(query)` searches title, content text, tags
- Debounced 150ms
- Case-insensitive matching
- Returns sorted results

### Sorting:
- By **updatedAt** (default, descending)
- By **createdAt** (ascending/descending)
- By **title** (alphabetical)
- By **manual** (preserves custom order)
- **Pinned notes always appear first**

### Filtering:
- `favorites` - starred notes
- `pinned` - pinned to top
- `archived` - archived notes
- `unarchived` - exclude archived (default)
- `all` - show everything

### Project Context Filtering:
- `getFilteredNotes()` respects `useProjectContextStore.activeProjectIds`
- Notes with matching `projectIds` shown in filtered view

---

## 8. TAG MANAGEMENT

### Features:
- Add/remove tags (max 50 per note, 50 char length)
- **Global tag operations:**
  - `getAllTags()` - sorted unique tags
  - `getTagUsageCounts()` - frequency map
  - `renameTag(old, new)` - all occurrences
  - `mergeTags(source[], target)` - combine multiple into one
  - `deleteTag(tag)` - remove from all notes

- **Bulk tag operations:**
  - `bulkAddTag(ids[], tag)` - add to multiple notes
  - `bulkRemoveTag(ids[], tag)` - remove from multiple
  - `replaceTag(old, new)` - global replacement with dedup

### Tag Suggestions (P2):
- Intelligent scoring (content, frequency, co-occurrence, hierarchical, recent)
- Hook: `useTags()` for tag operations

### Tag Hierarchy (P2):
- Support for hierarchical tags: `category/subcategory`
- Utilities exist in `utils/tagHierarchy.ts` (planned)

---

## 9. COMPONENT ECOSYSTEM

### Main Components:
- **NotesEditor.tsx** - Rich text editor widget
- **ExportNotesModal.tsx** - Export configuration UI
- **BacklinksPanel.tsx** - Displays incoming/outgoing links
- **NotePreviewPopover.tsx** - Hover preview display
- **DailyNotesCalendar.tsx** - Daily note navigation

### Editor Plugins/Nodes:
- **WikiLinkNode.tsx** - Custom node for [[links]]
- **WikiLinkAutocompletePlugin.tsx** - Autocomplete suggestions
- **WikiLinkTransformPlugin.tsx** - Detects & transforms [[text]]
- **HashtagNode.tsx** - Custom #tag node
- **HashtagPlugin.tsx** - Parses #tags
- **BlockReferencePlugin.tsx** - Handles [[Note#block]]
- **HoverPreviewPlugin.tsx** - Hover popover logic
- **BlockIdIndicator.tsx** - Visual block IDs in editor
- **AutocompleteDropdown.tsx** - Shared dropdown UI for autocomplete
- **ImageNode.tsx** - Image storage + rendering

### Utility Components:
- **TagPicker** - Tag selection/creation UI
- **CustomFieldEditor** - P2: metadata field editing
- **ConfirmDialog** - Confirmation UI for actions

---

## 10. UTILITIES & HELPERS

### Backlink Utilities (`src/utils/backlinks.ts`):
- `extractWikiLinks(content)` - regex [[...]] parsing
- `resolveLinksToIds(titles[], notes)` - link title → note ID resolution
- `getBacklinks(noteId, title, notes)` - notes linking TO this
- `findUnlinkedMentions(noteId, title, notes)` - P1: implicit references
- `findBrokenLinks(content, notes)` - P1: dead links

### Block References (`src/utils/blockReferences.ts`):
- `findBlockInContent(text, blockId)` - locate block
- `parseBlockReference(reference)` - parse `[[Note#blockId]]`

### Note Preview (`src/utils/notePreview.ts`):
- `createNotePreview(note, blockId?)` - generate preview text/metadata

### Hashtag Utilities (`src/utils/hashtags.ts`):
- Parse and extract hashtags from content

### Tag Suggestions (`src/utils/tagSuggestions.ts`):
- Intelligent suggestions with scoring

### Tag Hierarchy (`src/utils/tagHierarchy.ts`):
- Hierarchical tag structure support (planned)

### Daily Notes Service (`src/services/dailyNotes.ts`):
- `getDailyNote(date, notes, settings)`
- `createDailyNote(date, settings)`
- Template placeholder replacement ({date}, {yesterday}, {tomorrow})

## 11. MISSING/FUTURE FEATURES

### Documented as Future (in types comments):
- `isTemplate?` - Note templates
- `mentions?` - @mentions system
- `attachments?` - File attachments
- `collaborators?` - Shared editing
- `version?` - Conflict resolution
- `encryptionKey?` - Note encryption (Q2 2026)
- `isShared?` - Folder sharing
- Folder `permissions?`, `defaultTags?`
- Collaboration features

### P1 (High Priority - Planned):
- Unlinked mentions detection
- Broken link detection + fixing
- Block-level linking/referencing
- Tag suggestions (intelligent)
- Hashtag support (#tag syntax) - **partially implemented**

### P2 (Medium Priority):
- Custom fields on notes
- Tag hierarchy (category/subcategory)
- Block-level hover previews
- Note preview caching + performance optimization

### Notable Gaps Compared to Modern Note Apps:
- No mention/@ linking system
- No collaborative editing
- No encryption
- No file attachments
- No external API integrations
- No version history/branching
- No shared notebooks
- No real-time sync (local-first only)
- No obsidian.md plugin compatibility
- No schema/database queries (Datalog-style)
- No nested note hierarchies (only flat folder structure)
- No card/kanban views for notes
- No mind map view
- No timeline view
- No canvas/whiteboard mode
- No transclusion (embedding other notes)
- No bidirectional block linking (only document-level)
- No tag autocomplete suggestions during editing (UI only)

---

## 12. TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE

### Storage:
- **IndexedDB** via Zustand persist middleware
- **Dexie wrapper** in `src/services/indexedDB.ts`
- **Image storage:** Compressed in IndexedDB with blob URLs

### Performance:
- Auto-save debounce: 2000ms
- Search debounce: 150ms
- Hover preview debounce: 500ms
- Lexical editor optimized for large documents (1M char limit)
- Selector hooks for optimized re-renders

### Security:
- No `innerHTML` (all content via Lexical)
- Input validation via Zod
- No external API calls (local-first)

### Date Format:
- Uses `YYYY-M-D` (non-padded) for consistency across app

### Accessibility:
- Semantic HTML (article, section, etc.)
- ARIA labels on interactive elements
- Keyboard navigation throughout
- Focus management in modals
- High contrast color tokens

---

## Summary

The Notes feature is **feature-rich and well-architected**, with:
- **Robust state management** via Zustand with persistence
- **Powerful linking** system (wiki-style backlinks, block references planned)
- **Rich editing** via Lexical with 10+ plugins
- **Multiple export formats** (Markdown, PDF, JSON, ZIP)
- **Template system** with 5 built-in templates + custom support
- **Advanced UX** (daily notes, hover previews, tag management)
- **Clear modernization path** with documented P1/P2/Phase 4 features

**Maturity level:** MVP+ (core features solid, advanced features partially planned)
